CustomField.description: Section name for UI grouping. Fields with the same value will be grouped together under a section header in the dynamic form. Leave blank to display the field outside any section.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: - Enter a section name to group this field with others under a common header in the generated UI (e.g., “Financials”, “Details”). - All fields with the same section name will appear together under that header. - The order of sections is determined by the lowest Order value among fields in that section. - Fields within a section are also ordered by their Order value. - Leave blank if this field should not be grouped under a section.
CustomField.label: Section Name
